posts.author: Lasa (Marco Lasagna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
If I have a subtask to complete for a different date from that of the main task and in this specific case the subtask is to be completed by today, in the “My Work” section it does not appear as today’s tasks but in later days tasks because it takes as completion day that of the main task.
Is there an option to fix it?
